channel.title: Stagflation on MinWeb
channel.description: Recent content in Stagflation on MinWeb

item.title: Why the Fed Won’t Cut Rates Despite Trump’s Demands
item.description: Despite political pressure for rate cuts, the Fed is holding steady because interest rates cannot solve the physical supply chain crisis and inflation.

item.title: Trump Demands Rate Cuts: Why the Fed Is Paralyzed
item.description: Discover why the Federal Reserve remains paralyzed on interest rates as they navigate the stagflation trap caused by global supply chain disruptions.

item.title: Why Trump’s Demand for Rate Cuts Won’t Fix Stagflation
item.description: Discover why slashing interest rates won't resolve today's stagflation as supply-side shocks and energy costs continue to drive inflation beyond the Fed's...
